title: Add Caddy route for brain.{domain} with bearer auth
userStory: As an operator, I want brain.{domain} reverse-proxied to Graphiti behind a bearer token so that the laptop can reach the brain over HTTPS without exposing it publicly.
acceptanceCriteria: compose/Caddyfile has a brain.{$BRAIN_DOMAIN} block with bearer-matched reverse_proxy to graphiti:8000
Requests without the bearer header receive 401 from Caddy
TLS auto-issued by Let's Encrypt (default Caddy behavior)
compose/.env.example contains BRAIN_DOMAIN and BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN with placeholder values; real values only in untracked .env
Verify: from laptop, curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN' https://brain.{domain}/healthz returns 200; without header returns 401
